docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF XIHE LIU IS PRESENT VIA ZOOMGOV. PLAINTIFF XIHE LIU IS PRESENT VIA ZOOMGOV. DEFENDANT XINYI ZHAO IS NOT PRESENT. BOTH PLAINTIFFS ARE ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AI DONG NI, OATH ON FILE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, XIHE
